Identification_Area.title: MSAM MAST_LEFT EDR Observational Product - ml0_674204096edr_s0880000mcam00054d

Internal_Reference.comment: This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the Mars_Science_Laboratory Mission.
This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the Mars Science Laboratory spacecraft.
This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the Mast Camera Left onboard the Mars Science Laboratory spacecraft.
This is the PDS4 logical identifier for the planet - mars.

geom:Geometry_Lander.geom:description: Geometry as reported by the spacecraft in telemetry

msn_surface:Observational_Intent.msn_surface:activity_notes: Stereo documentation of target Belves for 3D modeling and monitoring of structural sand cracks

proc:Process.proc:process_owner_institution_name: MSAM - MASTCAM STEREO ANALYSIS AND MOSAICS PROJECT - JET PROPULSION LAB

proc:Software_Program.proc:name: MMMEDRGEN
proc:Software_Program.proc:description: CODMAC LEVEL 1 to LEVEL 2 CONVERSION VIA MSSS MMMEDRGEN
